content.text:
The original task encompasses parsing, validation, and persistence — too large for one worker pass. Splitting into three sub-tasks.

```json
{"action":"review","worker_id":"mock-1","decision":"split","sub_tasks":[{"title":"Add request parser","description":"Parse the incoming JSON into a typed Request struct."},{"title":"Add field validation","description":"Validate required fields and ranges."},{"title":"Wire persistence","description":"Persist the validated request to the local store."}]}
```
